title: Rhythm: essay flow
text: The question, then, is not whether change will come — it always does — but how we respond to it. Adapting requires courage. Adapting well requires both courage and curiosity. Together, these two qualities define every generation that has ever shaped the future.

character_tips.anna: Essay flow at 91 WPM. Real academic speed.
character_tips.klavochka: Wisdom flowing in sentences, my sunshine 🌟
